title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: They will announce the winner later today.
‘I didn't break the window,’ the boy said.
The project was only successful because of your hard work.
questions.secondSentence: The project would have failed (1) _________ your hard work.

questions.firstSentence: I am certain he was happy with his results.
questions.explanation: Tests modal perfect for positive deduction.

questions.firstSentence: I have never seen such a spectacular performance.
questions.secondSentence: Never before (1) _________ such a spectacular performance.

questions.firstSentence: I find it difficult to understand his logic.
